items.criterion: bunker exec command exists in internal/cli/exec.go with agent-id, command, and optional args
items.detail: internal/cli/exec.go:18-29 — cobra.Command with Use: "exec <agent-id> <command> [args...]" and Args: cobra.MinimumNArgs(2) extracts agentID=args[0], command=args[1], commandArgs=args[2:]

items.criterion: bunker exec is wired into cmd/bunker/main.go
items.detail: cmd/bunker/main.go:33 — root.AddCommand(cli.NewExecCommand()) is registered in the root command

items.criterion: ExecAgent RPC is implemented in internal/server/service.go via SSH to agent user
items.detail: internal/server/service.go:155-170 — ExecAgent method uses exec.CommandContext(ctx, "ssh", ..., fmt.Sprintf("bunker-%s@localhost", agentID), "--", req.Msg.Command)

items.criterion: Server streams stdout/stderr concurrently and returns exit code
items.detail: internal/server/service.go:180-253 — Two goroutines with sync.WaitGroup stream stdout and stderr concurrently via stream.Send; final stream.Send with ExitCode after cmd.Wait() captures exit code

items.criterion: 9 tests in exec_test.go cover help, no-server, success, exit-code, server-error, agent-not-found, stderr-output, timeout-flag, missing-args
items.detail: internal/cli/exec_test.go — 9 tests: TestExecCommand_Help (87), TestExecCommand_NoServer (104), TestExecCommand_Success (118), TestExecCommand_ExitCode (140), TestExecCommand_ServerError (160), TestExecCommand_AgentNotFound (174), TestExecCommand_StderrOutput (188), TestExecCommand_TimeoutFlag (204), TestExecCommand_MissingArgs (220).
